zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus於1245年出生在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆時，他的父親Gilbert Umfraville50歲，母親Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu30歲。他和Elizabeth Comyn至少有3個兒子。他於1277年登記服兵役。他去世於1307年10月13日之前在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多，埋葬在英國越可爾馬利可聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus was born in 1245, in Hexham, Northumberland, England, his father, Gilbert Umfraville, was 50 and his mother, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, was 30. He had at least 3 sons with Elizabeth Comyn. He registered for military service in 1277. He died before 13 October 1307, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus est né en 1245, à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Umfraville, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Elizabeth Comyn. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1277. Il est décédé avant 13 octobre 1307, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus 1245 in Hexham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Umfraville 50 und seine Mutter Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu 30. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Comyn mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1277 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb vor 13. Oktober 1307 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England und wurde in St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus è nato il nel 1245 nel Hexham, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Umfraville, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Elizabeth Comyn. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1277. Morì prima del 13 ottobre 1307, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, e fu sepolto a St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angusが1245年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムで生まれた時，父Gilbert Umfravilleは50歳，母Matilda de Angus Countess of Anguは30歳であった。彼はElizabeth Comynとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1277年に兵役登録をした。彼は1307年10月13日以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアマリックスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire,: 영국 요르크실르 마릭 스트 앤드루'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus(이)가 1245년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Umfraville(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Comyn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1277년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1307년 10월 13일 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 플루드호에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 마릭 스트 앤드루'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus nasceu em 1245, em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Umfraville, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Elizabeth Comyn. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1277. Ele faleceu antes 13 de outubro de 1307, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Andrew's Church, Marrick, Yorkshire,: ст андрю'с чурч, маррикк, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus родился в 1245 г. в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Umfraville было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Elizabeth Comyn. В 1277 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 13 октябрь 1307 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, маррикк, еркшир, Англия.
